result.text: Scan result: a long-range habitat vessel. Registered occupants: {n:2-4} plus one dog co-pilot. Bumper stickers indicate {n:12-38} previous star systems visited. Hail the dog, or scan the itinerary?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

dog.text: The dog has noticed us. Ears: deployed. Head: tilted {n:12-40} degrees. It awaits our message. This is a delicate first contact, Captain.

goodboy.text: Message received. Tail telemetry off the charts. The dog has accepted us into its extended pack. This alliance will outlast empires.

formal.text: Formal greetings delivered. The dog respects protocol and has responded with one dignified boof. Diplomatic relations: established.

itin.text: Itinerary: {pick:every national park in reachable space|a slow spiral toward a grandchild|nowhere twice}. These are professionals of wandering. We are but apprentices.
